case_title: ANTONIO ACCARDO VS. EVENTS BY CORSI,INC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-20-2015 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR CHECKS TO CLEAR. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. IF NO APPEARANCES ON APRIL 20, 2015, THEN THE MATTER SHALL BE DISMISSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
ORDER (SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ACCARDO, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT EVENTS BY CORSI,INC CORSI, MARC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED JUN-17-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EVENTS BY CORSI,INC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CORSI, MARC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-23-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "MATTER IS SETTLED--DEFENDANT HAS MADE A PAYMENT OF $1,000 TODAY, PAYMENTS OF $1,000 ARE DUE FROM DEFENDANT ON OCTOBER 15, NOVEMBER 15, DECEMBER 15 AND A FINAL PAYMENT OF $6,000 DUE ON JANUARY 15, 2015. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT BUT WERE REPRESENTED BY PATRICIA L. FAIRBROTHER--EXEC. ASST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EVENTS BY CORSI,INC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT EVENTS BY CORSI,INC CORSI, MARC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-03-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 3/6/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
